examples.title: Pseudocode: ArrayList Implementation
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating the basic operations of an ArrayList
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ArrayList
INPUT: initialCapacity
OUTPUT: ArrayList instance

BEGIN
 IF initialCapacity <= 0 THEN
 THROW Exception("Initial capacity must be greater than 0")
 END IF
 capacity = initialCapacity
 size = 0
 elements = NEW Array(capacity)

 PROCEDURE add(element)
 IF size >= capacity THEN
 capacity = capacity * 2
 elements = RESIZE Array(elements, capacity)
 END IF
 elements[size] = element
 size = size + 1
 END PROCEDURE

 PROCEDURE get(index)
 IF index < 0 OR index >= size THEN
 THROW Exception("Index out of bounds")
 END IF
 RETURN elements[index]
 END PROCEDURE
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic operations of an ArrayList, including initialization, adding elements, and retrieving elements.

examples.title: Java: ArrayList Implementation
examples.explanation: This Java implementation demonstrates the basic operations of an ArrayList, including initialization, adding elements, and retrieving elements.
examples.timeComplexity: O(1) for add and get operations
